@mlc-ai/web-llm.purpose: On-device LLM inference (AI day summary). Loaded dynamically only when the user clicks Summarize.

google-gsi.purpose: Google Identity Services — OAuth2 token client for Google Drive sync.

google_drive_v3.purpose: Optional cloud sync — stores journal_data.json in a private, app-sandboxed Drive folder.

google_oauth.purpose: OAuth2 token exchange for Drive access.

Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct-q4f16_1-MLC.purpose: Structured AI summary (Wins / Themes / Reflection). Recommended model.

notes.no_npm: This project has no npm/Node dependencies. All external code is loaded from CDN at runtime.
notes.offline: After first load, the app runs fully offline. CDN assets are cached by the service worker (sw.js). AI models are cached in IndexedDB by WebLLM.
notes.privacy: No analytics, tracking, or telemetry dependencies of any kind.
